prompt: ARO snippet for a Mustache-style template render.
actual:
```aro
(Render Template: MustacheRender) {
    Create the <template> from the <mustache-template>.
    Render the <template> with the <data>.
    Return the<OK: status> with the <rendered-output>.
}
```
expected:
```aro
(Render: Example) {
    Create the <template> with "Hello, {{name}}!".
    Create the <data> with { name: "Ada" }.
    Render the <html> from the <template> with <data>.
    Return an <OK: status> with <html>.
}
```
